bis_stages.sample_note: Sample of 32000 BIS jobs signed off 2022-2025 (up to 8,000/yr); milestone dates are text-typed in the source, parsed client-side.

clocks_delivery.note: Client-side join of 9227 NB initial filings to 2799 jobs with an issued Initial/Final CO (earliest per job); cohort = COs issued in the past 12 months. Only completed buildings are measurable, so the cohort skews toward projects that finished — a survivorship limit of published data.

queries.purpose: quarterly clock, all filings (approvals per quarter, days measured back to filing)
queries.soql: SELECT date_extract_y(approved_date) AS yy, case(date_extract_m(approved_date) <= 3, "Q1", date_extract_m(approved_date) <= 6, "Q2", date_extract_m(approved_date) <= 9, "Q3", TRUE, "Q4") AS qq, filing_review_type, COUNT(*) AS n, median(date_diff_d(approved_date, filing_date)) AS med_days, sum(case(date_diff_d(approved_date, filing_date) <= 42, 1, TRUE, 0)) AS within_6wk, sum(proposed_dwelling_units::number) AS units WHERE approved_date >= "2021-01-01" AND job_filing_number LIKE "%-I1" GROUP BY yy, qq, filing_review_type ORDER BY yy, qq LIMIT 200

queries.purpose: DOB NOW clock by job type (12mo)
queries.soql: SELECT job_type, filing_review_type, COUNT(*) AS n, median(date_diff_d(approved_date, filing_date)) AS med_days WHERE approved_date >= "2025-07-01" AND job_filing_number LIKE "%-I1" GROUP BY job_type, filing_review_type ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 30

queries.purpose: DOB NOW standard-review clock by borough (12mo)
queries.soql: SELECT borough, COUNT(*) AS n, median(date_diff_d(approved_date, filing_date)) AS med_days WHERE approved_date >= "2025-07-01" AND job_filing_number LIKE "%-I1" AND filing_review_type = "Standard Plan Examination" GROUP BY borough ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 8

SELECT case(job_type = "New Building" AND (proposed_dwelling_units::number > 99 OR proposed_no_of_stories::number >= 10), "new_tower", job_type = "New Building" AND proposed_dwelling_units::number > 25, "new_large_mf", job_type = "New Building" AND proposed_dwelling_units::number > 3, "new_small_mf", job_type = "New Building", "new_house", job_type = "Alteration" AND building_type IN ("1 Family", "2 Family", "3 Family"), "home_reno", TRUE, "other_work") AS segment, date_extract_y(approved_date) AS yy, case(date_extract_m(approved_date) <= 3, "Q1", date_extract_m(approved_date) <= 6, "Q2", date_extract_m(approved_date) <= 9, "Q3", TRUE, "Q4") AS qq, filing_review_type, COUNT(*) AS n, median(date_diff_d(approved_date, filing_date)) AS med_days, sum(case(date_diff_d(approved_date, filing_date) <= 42, 1, TRUE, 0)) AS within_6wk, sum(proposed_dwelling_units::number) AS units WHERE approved_date >= "2021-01-01" AND job_filing_number LIKE "%-I1" GROUP BY segment, yy, qq, filing_review_type ORDER BY yy, qq LIMIT 2000

SELECT borough, case(job_type = "New Building" AND (proposed_dwelling_units::number > 99 OR proposed_no_of_stories::number >= 10), "new_tower", job_type = "New Building" AND proposed_dwelling_units::number > 25, "new_large_mf", job_type = "New Building" AND proposed_dwelling_units::number > 3, "new_small_mf", job_type = "New Building", "new_house", job_type = "Alteration" AND building_type IN ("1 Family", "2 Family", "3 Family"), "home_reno", TRUE, "other_work") AS segment, COUNT(*) AS n, median(date_diff_d(approved_date, filing_date)) AS med_days WHERE approved_date >= "2025-07-01" AND job_filing_number LIKE "%-I1" AND filing_review_type = "Standard Plan Examination" GROUP BY borough, segment ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 60

SELECT filing_status, case(job_type = "New Building" AND (proposed_dwelling_units::number > 99 OR proposed_no_of_stories::number >= 10), "new_tower", job_type = "New Building" AND proposed_dwelling_units::number > 25, "new_large_mf", job_type = "New Building" AND proposed_dwelling_units::number > 3, "new_small_mf", job_type = "New Building", "new_house", job_type = "Alteration" AND building_type IN ("1 Family", "2 Family", "3 Family"), "home_reno", TRUE, "other_work") AS segment, COUNT(*) AS n, median(date_diff_d("2026-07-17", filing_date)) AS med_age_days WHERE filing_status NOT IN ("LOC Issued", "Approved", "Permit Entire", "CO Issued", "TA Certificate of Operation Issued", "PA Certificate of Operation Issued", "Filing Withdrawn", "Full Demolition Signed-off", "Permit Issued", "PAA Approved", "LL 158-2017-Denied") AND job_filing_number LIKE "%-I1" GROUP BY filing_status, segment ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 250

SELECT case(job_type = "New Building" AND (proposed_dwelling_units::number > 99 OR proposed_no_of_stories::number >= 10), "new_tower", job_type = "New Building" AND proposed_dwelling_units::number > 25, "new_large_mf", job_type = "New Building" AND proposed_dwelling_units::number > 3, "new_small_mf", job_type = "New Building", "new_house", job_type = "Alteration" AND building_type IN ("1 Family", "2 Family", "3 Family"), "home_reno", TRUE, "other_work") AS segment, COUNT(*) AS n, sum(case(date_diff_d("2026-07-17", filing_date) <= 30, 1, TRUE, 0)) AS age_0_30, sum(case(date_diff_d("2026-07-17", filing_date) > 30 AND date_diff_d("2026-07-17", filing_date) <= 90, 1, TRUE, 0)) AS age_31_90, sum(case(date_diff_d("2026-07-17", filing_date) > 90 AND date_diff_d("2026-07-17", filing_date) <= 365, 1, TRUE, 0)) AS age_91_365, sum(case(date_diff_d("2026-07-17", filing_date) > 365, 1, TRUE, 0)) AS age_over_1yr WHERE filing_status NOT IN ("LOC Issued", "Approved", "Permit Entire", "CO Issued", "TA Certificate of Operation Issued", "PA Certificate of Operation Issued", "Filing Withdrawn", "Full Demolition Signed-off", "Permit Issued", "PAA Approved", "LL 158-2017-Denied") AND job_filing_number LIKE "%-I1" GROUP BY segment LIMIT 20

SELECT case(job_type = "New Building" AND (proposed_dwelling_units::number > 99 OR proposed_no_of_stories::number >= 10), "new_tower", job_type = "New Building" AND proposed_dwelling_units::number > 25, "new_large_mf", job_type = "New Building" AND proposed_dwelling_units::number > 3, "new_small_mf", job_type = "New Building", "new_house", job_type = "Alteration" AND building_type IN ("1 Family", "2 Family", "3 Family"), "home_reno", TRUE, "other_work") AS segment, filing_review_type, COUNT(*) AS n, median(date_diff_d(approved_date, filing_date)) AS med_days, sum(case(date_diff_d(approved_date, filing_date) <= 42, 1, TRUE, 0)) AS within_6wk WHERE approved_date >= "2025-07-01" AND job_filing_number LIKE "%-I1" AND approved_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY segment, filing_review_type LIMIT 40

queries.purpose: DOB NOW open queue by status with median age
queries.soql: SELECT filing_status, COUNT(*) AS n, median(date_diff_d("2026-07-17", filing_date)) AS med_age_days WHERE filing_status NOT IN ("LOC Issued", "Approved", "Permit Entire", "CO Issued", "TA Certificate of Operation Issued", "PA Certificate of Operation Issued", "Filing Withdrawn", "Full Demolition Signed-off", "Permit Issued", "PAA Approved", "LL 158-2017-Denied") AND job_filing_number LIKE "%-I1" GROUP BY filing_status ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 30

queries.purpose: DOB NOW open queue aging buckets
queries.soql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n, sum(case(date_diff_d("2026-07-17", filing_date) <= 30, 1, TRUE, 0)) AS age_0_30, sum(case(date_diff_d("2026-07-17", filing_date) > 30 AND date_diff_d("2026-07-17", filing_date) <= 90, 1, TRUE, 0)) AS age_31_90, sum(case(date_diff_d("2026-07-17", filing_date) > 90 AND date_diff_d("2026-07-17", filing_date) <= 365, 1, TRUE, 0)) AS age_91_365, sum(case(date_diff_d("2026-07-17", filing_date) > 365, 1, TRUE, 0)) AS age_over_1yr WHERE filing_status NOT IN ("LOC Issued", "Approved", "Permit Entire", "CO Issued", "TA Certificate of Operation Issued", "PA Certificate of Operation Issued", "Filing Withdrawn", "Full Demolition Signed-off", "Permit Issued", "PAA Approved", "LL 158-2017-Denied") AND job_filing_number LIKE "%-I1"
SELECT pre__filing_date, assigned, approved, fully_permitted, signoff_date WHERE signoff_date LIKE "%/2022" AND pre__filing_date IS NOT NULL LIMIT 8000
SELECT pre__filing_date, assigned, approved, fully_permitted, signoff_date WHERE signoff_date LIKE "%/2023" AND pre__filing_date IS NOT NULL LIMIT 8000
SELECT pre__filing_date, assigned, approved, fully_permitted, signoff_date WHERE signoff_date LIKE "%/2024" AND pre__filing_date IS NOT NULL LIMIT 8000
SELECT pre__filing_date, assigned, approved, fully_permitted, signoff_date WHERE signoff_date LIKE "%/2025" AND pre__filing_date IS NOT NULL LIMIT 8000

queries.purpose: LPC received->issued clock, permits issued past 12mo
queries.soql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n, median(date_diff_d(issue_date, received_date)) AS med_days WHERE issue_date >= "2025-07-01" AND received_date IS NOT NULL

queries.purpose: DOT street construction permit volume (no application date -> no clock)
queries.soql: SELECT date_trunc_y(permitissuedate) AS yr, COUNT(*) AS n WHERE permitissuedate >= "2022-01-01" GROUP BY yr ORDER BY yr

queries.purpose: DEP water/sewer permit volume (no application date -> no clock)
queries.soql: SELECT date_trunc_y(issuancedate) AS yr, COUNT(*) AS n WHERE issuancedate >= "2021-01-01" GROUP BY yr ORDER BY yr
SELECT requeststatus, COUNT(*) AS n GROUP BY requeststatus ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 12

SELECT date_extract_y(approved_date) AS yy, case(date_extract_m(approved_date) <= 3, "Q1", date_extract_m(approved_date) <= 6, "Q2", date_extract_m(approved_date) <= 9, "Q3", TRUE, "Q4") AS qq, filing_review_type, COUNT(*) AS n, median(date_diff_d(approved_date, filing_date)) AS med_days, sum(case(date_diff_d(approved_date, filing_date) <= 42, 1, TRUE, 0)) AS within_6wk, sum(proposed_dwelling_units::number) AS units WHERE approved_date >= "2021-01-01" AND job_type = "New Building" AND job_filing_number LIKE "%-I1" GROUP BY yy, qq, filing_review_type ORDER BY yy, qq LIMIT 100

SELECT borough, COUNT(*) AS n, median(date_diff_d(approved_date, filing_date)) AS med_days WHERE approved_date >= "2025-07-01" AND job_type = "New Building" AND job_filing_number LIKE "%-I1" AND filing_review_type = "Standard Plan Examination" GROUP BY borough ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 8

SELECT filing_status, COUNT(*) AS n, median(date_diff_d("2026-07-17", filing_date)) AS med_age_days WHERE filing_status NOT IN ("LOC Issued", "Approved", "Permit Entire", "CO Issued", "TA Certificate of Operation Issued", "PA Certificate of Operation Issued", "Filing Withdrawn", "Full Demolition Signed-off", "Permit Issued", "PAA Approved", "LL 158-2017-Denied") AND job_type = "New Building" AND job_filing_number LIKE "%-I1" GROUP BY filing_status ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 30

SELECT COUNT(*) AS n, sum(case(date_diff_d("2026-07-17", filing_date) <= 30, 1, TRUE, 0)) AS age_0_30, sum(case(date_diff_d("2026-07-17", filing_date) > 30 AND date_diff_d("2026-07-17", filing_date) <= 90, 1, TRUE, 0)) AS age_31_90, sum(case(date_diff_d("2026-07-17", filing_date) > 90 AND date_diff_d("2026-07-17", filing_date) <= 365, 1, TRUE, 0)) AS age_91_365, sum(case(date_diff_d("2026-07-17", filing_date) > 365, 1, TRUE, 0)) AS age_over_1yr WHERE filing_status NOT IN ("LOC Issued", "Approved", "Permit Entire", "CO Issued", "TA Certificate of Operation Issued", "PA Certificate of Operation Issued", "Filing Withdrawn", "Full Demolition Signed-off", "Permit Issued", "PAA Approved", "LL 158-2017-Denied") AND job_type = "New Building" AND job_filing_number LIKE "%-I1"

SELECT filing_review_type, COUNT(*) AS n, median(date_diff_d(approved_date, filing_date)) AS med_days, sum(case(date_diff_d(approved_date, filing_date) <= 42, 1, TRUE, 0)) AS within_6wk WHERE approved_date >= "2025-07-01" AND job_type = "New Building" AND job_filing_number LIKE "%-I1" GROUP BY filing_review_type LIMIT 6

queries.purpose: permission clock by segment (permits issued past 12mo, measured back to filing)
queries.soql: SELECT case(job_type = "New Building" AND (proposed_dwelling_units::number > 99 OR proposed_no_of_stories::number >= 10), "new_tower", job_type = "New Building" AND proposed_dwelling_units::number > 25, "new_large_mf", job_type = "New Building" AND proposed_dwelling_units::number > 3, "new_small_mf", job_type = "New Building", "new_house", job_type = "Alteration" AND building_type IN ("1 Family", "2 Family", "3 Family"), "home_reno", TRUE, "other_work") AS segment, COUNT(*) AS n, median(date_diff_d(approved_date, filing_date)) AS med_approval, median(date_diff_d(first_permit_date, filing_date)) AS med_first_permit WHERE first_permit_date IS NOT NULL AND approved_date IS NOT NULL AND first_permit_date >= "2025-07-17" AND job_filing_number LIKE "%-I1" GROUP BY segment LIMIT 20

queries.purpose: permission clock, new housing (NB permits issued past 12mo, measured back to filing)
queries.soql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n, median(date_diff_d(approved_date, filing_date)) AS med_approval, median(date_diff_d(first_permit_date, filing_date)) AS med_first_permit WHERE first_permit_date IS NOT NULL AND approved_date IS NOT NULL AND first_permit_date >= "2025-07-17" AND job_type = "New Building" AND job_filing_number LIKE "%-I1"

queries.purpose: permission clock, all projects (permits issued past 12mo, measured back to filing)
queries.soql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n, median(date_diff_d(approved_date, filing_date)) AS med_approval, median(date_diff_d(first_permit_date, filing_date)) AS med_first_permit WHERE first_permit_date IS NOT NULL AND approved_date IS NOT NULL AND first_permit_date >= "2025-07-17" AND job_filing_number LIKE "%-I1"

SELECT job_filing_name, c_of_o_filing_type, c_of_o_issuance_date WHERE job_type = "New Building" AND c_of_o_status = "CO Issued" AND c_of_o_filing_type IN ("Initial", "Final") ORDER BY job_filing_name LIMIT 5000 OFFSET 0

SELECT job_filing_name, c_of_o_filing_type, c_of_o_issuance_date WHERE job_type = "New Building" AND c_of_o_status = "CO Issued" AND c_of_o_filing_type IN ("Initial", "Final") ORDER BY job_filing_name LIMIT 5000 OFFSET 5000

queries.purpose: NB initial filings for CO join, page 1
queries.soql: SELECT job_filing_number, filing_date, proposed_dwelling_units, proposed_no_of_stories WHERE job_type = "New Building" AND job_filing_number LIKE "%-I1" AND filing_date IS NOT NULL ORDER BY job_filing_number LIMIT 8000 OFFSET 0

queries.purpose: NB initial filings for CO join, page 2
queries.soql: SELECT job_filing_number, filing_date, proposed_dwelling_units, proposed_no_of_stories WHERE job_type = "New Building" AND job_filing_number LIKE "%-I1" AND filing_date IS NOT NULL ORDER BY job_filing_number LIMIT 8000 OFFSET 8000

SELECT COUNT(*) AS filings_12mo, median(date_diff_d(approved_date, filing_date)) AS med_days_all, sum(case(filing_review_type = "Standard Plan Examination", 1, TRUE, 0)) AS standard_review_n WHERE approved_date >= "2025-07-01" AND job_filing_number LIKE "%-I1" AND approved_date IS NOT NULL

queries.purpose: hero: standard plan exam 12mo median + within-6wk
queries.soql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n, median(date_diff_d(approved_date, filing_date)) AS med_days, sum(case(date_diff_d(approved_date, filing_date) <= 42, 1, TRUE, 0)) AS within_6wk WHERE approved_date >= "2025-07-01" AND job_filing_number LIKE "%-I1" AND approved_date IS NOT NULL AND filing_review_type = "Standard Plan Examination"
